positive: A mystical celestial forest at twilight, rendered in a modern linocut style with crisp, deep black silhouettes and vibrant pops of contrasting color. The central subject is a large, detailed bioluminescent mushroom cluster glowing with turquoise and amethyst light, nestled among stylized, curving tree trunks and exotic flora. The overall composition is symmetrical and vertically oriented, maximizing impact on fabric. Lighting is dramatic rim-lighting emphasizing the glowing elements and casting deep shadows. Color palette should be limited to deep indigo, rich teal, warm gold, and black. Highly intricate, clean lines, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifact, lowres, ugly, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grainy, grayscale, solid color background, photorealistic
